# zstack_flow_collector (Resource)

Manages a flow collector in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `flow_meter_uuid` (String) The UUID of the flow meter.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the flow collector.
- `name` (String) The name of the flow collector.
- `port` (Number) The port of the flow collector.
- `server` (String) The server of the flow collector.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the flow collector.
